conversation.speaker: User
conversation.text: I just moved to San Francisco last month from New York.

conversation.speaker: Assistant
conversation.text: Welcome to San Francisco! That's quite a big move from the East Coast to the West Coast. How are you finding the city so far?

conversation.speaker: User
conversation.text: It's been great! I got a job at a tech startup here. The weather is much nicer than NYC.

conversation.speaker: Assistant
conversation.text: That's wonderful! The tech scene in San Francisco is vibrant. The weather is definitely one of the perks - much milder than New York's extremes.

conversation.speaker: User
conversation.text: Yes, and I found a nice apartment in the Mission District. My commute is only 20 minutes by bike.

conversation.speaker: Assistant
conversation.text: The Mission District is a great neighborhood with lots of character and excellent food options. A 20-minute bike commute is perfect for San Francisco!

questions.question: Where did the user move from?
What is the user's commute time to work?
What neighborhood does the user live in and how do they commute?
When did the user move to San Francisco?
